assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response specifically recommends Extended channel with detailed rationale about 24-month support and disabled minor version auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response explicitly includes '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades' command and explains it blocks disruptive upgrades while allowing critical security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures a specific Saturday 6-10 AM maintenance window with weekly recurrence for predictable timing

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response creates separate node pools: 'h100-training' pool for training workloads and 'general-compute' pool for support workloads, with node taints for isolation

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response sets 'maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1' for training pools and includes operational workflow for manual upgrades during training gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes training job configuration with 'CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL: 3600' and mentions checkpointing every 1-2 hours in the operational workflow

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPU driver version testing or validation in staging environments before applying to production

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: While the response mentions 'Compact placement - Ensures RDMA topology is preserved', it does not specifically discuss GPUDirect/RDMA version compatibility requirements or verification before upgrades
